summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PíoBite cafeteria ordering system with real MongoDB backend implementation. All major features working including JWT authentication, real API integration, admin dashboard with live statistics, inventory management, payment simulation, and full user registration/login flows.
passed_tests: Backend API health check returns version 2.0.0
User registration creates new user and returns JWT tokens
Admin login with admin@piobite.es/admin123 returns JWT tokens and admin role
GET /api/auth/me returns current user info with Bearer token
GET /api/productos returns 12 products from MongoDB
GET /api/productos?categoria=bocadillos filters correctly (4 bocadillos)
GET /api/categorias returns 5 categories
GET /api/franjas-horarias returns 8 time slots with availability
POST /api/pedidos creates order with auth token
GET /api/pedidos/admin returns admin orders (5 orders found)
GET /api/inventario returns 12 products with stock (admin auth)
PATCH /api/inventario/{id} updates stock successfully (admin auth)
GET /api/estadisticas/resumen returns dashboard data (6 total orders, 19.8€ revenue)
GET /api/estadisticas/productos-top returns top products (6 items)
POST /api/pagos/iniciar returns Redsys simulation data
Frontend welcome screen loads with PíoBite branding
User registration flow works (name, email, password, confirm password)
Registration navigates to /home with 18 product cards displayed
Admin login with role toggle navigates to /admin dashboard
Admin dashboard shows Inventario and Estadísticas buttons
Inventory screen at /inventory shows 12 product stock controls
Stock increment/decrement buttons work with API integration
Availability toggle works with API integration
Statistics screen at /stats shows 6 analytics cards with real data
Order status breakdown with visual progress bars
Top products section shows sales data
Payment screen accessible at /payment with form fields
Cart navigation works with empty state display
Sidebar navigation with user profile display
